calendar_name: PATCC Core Economic and Market Events
description: Configuration-driven economic and market-event definitions used by PATCC for event timing, asset awareness, explainability, and future event-risk analysis.

events.name: US Consumer Price Index

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Inflation changes expected interest rates and long-duration equity valuations.
Inflation affects monetary-policy expectations and broad equity risk appetite.
Inflation and rate expectations affect financing conditions and domestic economic sensitivity.
Inflation directly influences long-term Treasury yields and bond prices.
Inflation affects intermediate-term Treasury yield expectations.
Gold reacts through real yields, inflation expectations, and the US dollar.
Silver reacts through real yields, the dollar, inflation, and industrial-demand expectations.
Crypto reacts to liquidity expectations, yields, dollar strength, and risk sentiment.
Ethereum reacts to liquidity expectations, yields, and broader digital-asset risk appetite.

events.explanation: CPI can materially alter expectations for Federal Reserve policy, Treasury yields, the US dollar, equities, precious metals, and crypto.
events.patcc_guidance: Require a fresh market-data update after release before relying on pre-release technical signals.

events.name: Federal Open Market Committee Rate Decision

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Policy guidance changes discount rates, liquidity expectations, and risk appetite.
Growth equities are especially sensitive to discount-rate expectations.
Small-cap companies are sensitive to financing conditions and domestic growth expectations.
Federal Reserve policy and guidance strongly influence Treasury yields.
Gold responds to real yields, monetary-policy expectations, and dollar movements.
Crypto is sensitive to global liquidity, dollar strength, and risk appetite.

events.explanation: FOMC decisions and guidance can rapidly reprice interest rates, currencies, equities, commodities, and crypto.
events.patcc_guidance: Increase event-risk warnings and require post-event confirmation before issuing high-confidence ACTION recommendations.

events.name: US Employment Situation Report

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Employment affects growth expectations, wages, inflation, and monetary policy.
Small caps are highly sensitive to domestic growth and financing conditions.
Industrial and cyclical companies respond to labor-market and growth expectations.
Employment strength can change rate expectations and Treasury yields.
Gold reacts indirectly through yields and the dollar.

events.explanation: Employment data influences growth, wage inflation, Federal Reserve expectations, Treasury yields, and cyclical assets.
events.patcc_guidance: Reassess broad equity, small-cap, Treasury, and dollar-sensitive signals after release.

events.name: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Crude inventory changes directly affect near-term oil supply expectations.
Energy-company earnings and sentiment are strongly influenced by crude-oil prices.
Inventory surprises can affect exploration and production companies.

events.explanation: Weekly petroleum inventories can create short-term volatility in crude oil, energy equities, refiners, and related ETFs.
events.patcc_guidance: Refresh USO and XLE data after release and compare the actual reaction with the pre-event technical thesis.

events.name: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage Report

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Storage changes directly affect natural-gas supply and demand expectations.

events.explanation: Natural-gas storage data can cause substantial volatility in natural-gas futures and related exchange-traded products.
events.patcc_guidance: Treat pre-release UNG signals as provisional and require post-release price and volume confirmation.

events.name: US Treasury 10-Year Note Auction

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Auction demand directly influences intermediate Treasury yields.
Auction results can influence the broader Treasury yield curve.
Growth-stock valuations react to changes in market interest rates.
Gold can react to real-yield and dollar changes following auction results.

events.explanation: Treasury-auction demand can change yields, the dollar, equity valuations, and precious-metal conditions.
events.patcc_guidance: Monitor Treasury and rate-sensitive assets before and after the auction.

events.name: Monthly Equity and Index Options Expiration

affected_assets.transmission_channel: Dealer hedging and option-positioning flows can influence intraday price behavior.
Large index-option positions can influence volatility and closing flows.
Leveraged exposure can amplify moves originating in QQQ and dealer hedging.
Inverse leveraged exposure can amplify QQQ-related expiration volatility.

events.explanation: Options expiration can increase hedging activity, liquidity shifts, pinning behavior, and closing-session volatility.
events.patcc_guidance: Increase awareness of non-directional flow effects and avoid interpreting every expiration-day move as fundamental.
